S.FORM: == Sokoy 木鱉果 == Caay to ka'aloman ko mipaloma'ay to matiniay a sokay, carekahay ko tolak ningra, 'aledet a pacamolen to 'okak no titi no fafoy.
S.PHON: == so~uko~uj *** == ʦaaj to~u kaʡaɾo~uman ko~u mipaɾo~umaʡaj to~u matiniaj a so~ukaj, ʦarəkaħaj ko~u to~uɾak niŋra, ʡaɾəɬ~ɮət a paʦamo~uɾən to~u ʡo~ukak no~u titi no~u fafo~uj.
S.FORM: == Sokoy 木鱉果 == Caay to ka'aloman ko mipaloma'ay to matiniay a sokay, carekahay ko tolak ningra, 'aledet a pacamolen to 'okak no titi no fafoy.
S.PHON: == so~uko~uj *** == ʦaaj to~u kaʡaɾo~uman ko~u mipaɾo~umaʡaj to~u matiniaj a so~ukaj, ʦarəkaħaj ko~u to~uɾak niŋra, ʡaɾəɬ~ɮət a paʦamo~uɾən to~u ʡo~ukak no~u titi no~u fafo~uj.
